privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a new synthetic waypoint in Garmin BaseCamp. All metadata parameters including the waypoint name ('Damaged Bridge B-42'), coordinates (42.45100, -71.09800), web link ('https://city.gov/engineering/reports/b42.pdf' with text 'Structural Assessment B-42'), custom category ('Maintenance_Priority_1'), and output export path (C:\workspace\output\maintenance_export.gpx) are explicitly dictated by the task instructions and verified by the evaluation script logic. No external datasets are involved.
